top_signals.title: AI boom outweighs Iran war pain, Korean central bank chief says
top_signals.summary: Shin Hyun-song at first policymaking meeting projects boost to GDP on chip demand and surging stocks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Shrinking Oil Inventories Raise Fears of Prolonged Energy Crisis
top_signals.summary: Global oil inventories are fast approaching a critical point, with Asia the first facing “minimum operational levels” and Europe close behind. This is the latest in a growing series of warnings from industry experts about the state of oil supply and the prospects of a severe shortage. It seems the world is running out of time to avert a much bigger crisis than we already have. Asia is already struggling with supply, Jeff Currie, Senior Advisor at the Carlyle Group, told CNBC this week. Speaking on the sidelines of an industry event…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin could be heading much lower, fund manager warns as $150 billion Treasury operation nears
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman Desk Sees Korea Leveraged ETFs as Volatility Accelerator
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s leveraged exchange-traded funds tied to chipmakers may deepen concentration in the equity market and amplify volatility, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s sales desk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Palm Titan Wilmar Dives Most in Six Years on Indonesia Probe
top_signals.summary: Wilmar International Ltd. fell the most in almost six years after the Indonesian government named the palm oil titan as one of the companies being probed for suspected export abuses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Pinsent Masons is not the only City law firm walking a dangerous AI tightrope
top_signals.summary: A junior lawyer at Pinsent Masons used AI to draft misleading emails for a High Court case, highlighting how generational attitudes and lack of training risk new mistakes as law firms rush to adopt new technology, writes Maria Ward-Brennan. It has been a slow burner, but we finally have the first notable UK law firm [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Monzo goes mobile: UK fintech debuts cell service in tie-up with Virgin Media O2
top_signals.summary: Monzo is set to launch its mobile service this summer in the firm’s latest play at diversifying its income from its traditional digital banking roots. The London-based fintech has sealed a tie-up with Virgin Media O2 and 1Global to kick off ‘Monzo Mobile’ – a phone plan and e-sim offering. Virgin will provide the UK [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Davie and Kraken Team Up on Autonomous Vessels
top_signals.summary: Québec-based Davie and UK-based Kraken Technology Group have announced a strategic collaboration to establish Canadian production, integration and development of Kraken’s autonomous solutions.Davie will provide Canadian capacity and capability to produce…
